definition_of_positive: Positive when CG is aft of elastic axis
Always positive; onset of neutral stability (real(p)=0)

definition_of_positive: ≥ 1.0; per-condition input: 1.5 standard (FAR 25.303); 1.0 where limit treated as ultimate (FAR/CS 25.302 system-structure interaction failure cases)
Positive forward; actual speed of aircraft relative to undisturbed air mass
Positive forward; raw pitot-static reading uncorrected for instrument or position error
Positive forward; IAS corrected for instrument and position (static source) errors

Positive STARBOARD; y=0 at fuselage centerline (BL 0); y=s_m at right wingtip; y<0 for left wing; structural frame

variable_name: Vertical shear force at LRA cut
definition_of_positive: Positive upward (+z structural frame); force from inboard on outboard free body in +z direction; positive under lift loading (Lomax §5 positive shear)

variable_name: Chordwise shear force at LRA cut
definition_of_positive: Positive aft (+x structural frame); force from inboard on outboard free body in +x direction; positive under drag loading (Lomax §5)

variable_name: Spanwise axial force at LRA cut
definition_of_positive: Positive outboard (+y structural frame); spanwise tension positive; typically small for standard wing configurations (Lomax §5)

variable_name: Out-of-plane bending moment at LRA cut
definition_of_positive: Positive when wing bends upward; upper surface in compression; Mx = ∫ fz·(y−y_cut) dy — positive under lift loading; Lomax §5 positive bending
Positive leading-edge UP (nose-up twist); RHR about +y_starboard: +z toward +x rotation carries LE at (−x) upward (+z); Lomax §5 positive torsion

variable_name: In-plane bending moment at LRA cut
definition_of_positive: Positive when section bends toward aft (+x structural frame); computed from in-plane (drag-direction) loading; Lomax §5
Positive starboard; eta = y_m / s_m; 0 at root (BL 0); 1.0 at right wingtip; follows structural y convention
Positive downward (magnitude of descent speed at contact)
Always positive (total available stroke from ground to limit)
Always positive; vertical force at gear attachment point at peak of reserve energy stroke
Positive upward; = f_gear_n / w_aircraft_n; applied as quasi-static vertical load factor
Positive nose-up; aircraft pitch attitude at which tail structure first contacts runway in tail-down landing
Positive upward; applied bump load factor for taxi bump and rough runway conditions
Positive forward; aircraft ground speed during taxi or ground roll
Always positive; radius of circular taxi turn path
Always positive; vertical contact force at individual gear attachment
Positive in drag direction (opposing wheel rotation); braking moment at wheel axle
Positive; ratio of brake force to normal reaction; typically 0.80 dry runway per FAR 25.493
Positive into upper surface (suction side); perpendicular to local flap chord line
Positive aft (trailing-edge direction); parallel to local flap chord line
Positive upward (same sense as lift); integral of pn_pa over flap chord at one strip station
Positive aft (drag direction); integral of pc_pa over flap chord at one strip station
Always positive; chord of flap element from hinge line to trailing edge
